channel.title: TransferIntel
channel.description: Premier League transfer rumours scored 0 to 100 for credibility, with transparent value-for-money verdicts on confirmed fees.

item.title: Elliot Anderson to Man City: credibility 100/100
item.description: Elliot Anderson, CM, age 23, from Nott'm Forest to Man City for a reported £116m. Status: Completed. Credibility 100 out of 100, based on Sky Sports.

item.title: Sandro Tonali to Tottenham: credibility 100/100
item.description: Sandro Tonali, CM, age 26, from Newcastle to Tottenham for a reported £92.5m. Status: Completed. Credibility 100 out of 100, based on Sky Sports.

item.title: Mateus Fernandes to Tottenham: credibility 100/100
item.description: Mateus Fernandes, CM, age 21, from West Ham to Tottenham for a reported £85m. Status: Completed. Credibility 100 out of 100, based on Sky Sports.

item.title: Anthony Gordon to Barcelona: credibility 100/100
item.description: Anthony Gordon, LW, age 25, from Newcastle to Barcelona for a reported £69.3m. Status: Completed. Credibility 100 out of 100, based on Sky Sports.

item.title: Jeremy Jacquet to Liverpool: credibility 100/100
item.description: Jeremy Jacquet, CB, age 20, from Rennes to Liverpool for a reported £60m. Status: Completed. Credibility 100 out of 100, based on Sky Sports.

item.title: Jan Paul van Hecke to Tottenham: credibility 100/100
item.description: Jan Paul van Hecke, CB, age 26, from Brighton to Tottenham for a reported £52m. Status: Completed. Credibility 100 out of 100, based on Sky Sports.

item.title: Marc Cucurella to Real Madrid: credibility 100/100
item.description: Marc Cucurella, LB, age 27, from Chelsea to Real Madrid for a reported £51.8m. Status: Completed. Credibility 100 out of 100, based on Sky Sports.

item.title: Geovany Quenda to Chelsea: credibility 100/100
item.description: Geovany Quenda, RW, age 19, from Sporting CP to Chelsea for a reported £44m. Status: Completed. Credibility 100 out of 100, based on Sky Sports.

item.title: Marco Palestra to Chelsea: credibility 100/100
item.description: Marco Palestra, RB, age 21, from Atalanta to Chelsea for a reported £43m. Status: Completed. Credibility 100 out of 100, based on Sky Sports.

item.title: Rasmus Højlund to Napoli: credibility 100/100
item.description: Rasmus Højlund, ST, age 23, from Man Utd to Napoli for a reported £38m. Status: Completed. Credibility 100 out of 100, based on Sky Sports.

item.title: Piero Hincapié to Arsenal: credibility 100/100
item.description: Piero Hincapié, CB, age 24, from Leverkusen to Arsenal for a reported £34.5m. Status: Completed. Credibility 100 out of 100, based on Sky Sports.

item.title: Victor Muñoz to Liverpool: credibility 100/100
item.description: Victor Muñoz, RW, age 22, from Osasuna to Liverpool for a reported £34.5m. Status: Completed. Credibility 100 out of 100, based on Sky Sports.

item.description: Hayden Hackney, CM, age 23, from Middlesbrough to Everton for a reported £24m. Status: Completed. Credibility 100 out of 100, based on Sky Sports.

item.description: Merlin Röhl, CM, age 23, from Freiburg to Everton for a reported £21.7m. Status: Completed. Credibility 100 out of 100, based on Sky Sports.

item.description: Zadok Yohanna, ST, age 19, from AIK to Brighton for a reported £21.5m. Status: Completed. Credibility 100 out of 100, based on Sky Sports.

item.description: Donyell Malen, RW, age 27, from Aston Villa to Roma for a reported £21.7m. Status: Completed. Credibility 100 out of 100, based on Sky Sports.

item.description: Ewen Jaouen, GK, age 21, from Reims to Newcastle for a reported £18.5m. Status: Completed. Credibility 100 out of 100, based on Sky Sports.

item.description: Jannik Schuster, CM, age 20, from RB Salzburg to Brentford for a reported £16.5m. Status: Completed. Credibility 100 out of 100, based on Sky Sports.

item.title: Andrey Santos to Man Utd: credibility 90/100
item.description: Andrey Santos, CM, age 22, from Chelsea to Man Utd for a reported £48m. Status: Confirmed pending announcement. Credibility 90 out of 100, based on Ornstein.

item.title: Youri Tielemans to Man Utd: credibility 90/100
item.description: Youri Tielemans, CM, age 29, from Aston Villa to Man Utd for a reported £35m. Status: Confirmed pending announcement. Credibility 90 out of 100, based on Romano + Ornstein.

item.title: Johan Manzambi to Aston Villa: credibility 90/100
item.description: Johan Manzambi, AM, age 20, from Freiburg to Aston Villa for a reported £52m. Status: Confirmed pending announcement. Credibility 90 out of 100, based on Romano.

item.title: Luka Vusković to Brighton: credibility 67/100
item.description: Luka Vusković, CB, age 19, from Tottenham to Brighton for a reported £46m. Status: Confirmed pending announcement. Credibility 67 out of 100, based on Football365.

item.title: Leandro Trossard to Beşiktaş: credibility 67/100
item.description: Leandro Trossard, LW, age 31, from Arsenal to Beşiktaş for a reported £15.3m. Status: Confirmed pending announcement. Credibility 67 out of 100, based on Football365 / Romano.

item.title: Mason Greenwood to Fenerbahçe: credibility 57/100
item.description: Mason Greenwood, RW, age 24, from Marseille to Fenerbahçe. Status: Fee agreed. Credibility 57 out of 100, based on Romano.
